brett-k-moore.name: Brett K Moore
brett-k-moore.bio: Multi-business operator. AI Expert co-founder. Apex Podcast Co operator. Fifteen years building networks between operators and the audiences they need.

mike-partners.bio: Career operator turned author. Legacy Publishing partner. AI or Die is the playbook he wishes he had ten years ago.
